scale_language_assessment.note: The frozen envelope permits sign plus direction/order-of-magnitude language, never a slope law. The direct-arm separation gate fails and scale_trend_rag is invalid/false. verdict-gen nevertheless emits slope solely from the number of distinct rung labels, including R0, without consulting the separation gate or envelope; this is a verdict-generation defect.

truncation_assessment.note: All 194 truncated rows in each RAG cell are retained and correctly counted by the frozen analysis, so the recorded recompute itself has no row-handling mismatch. They materially affect magnitudes: excluding the common truncated indices changes R3 RAG accuracy from 0.339816 to 0.422733 and the primary from 0.660184 to 0.577267. Best-LLM remains llm-rag-R3 and rag_lift_r3 remains true, so neither identity nor the gate boolean changes.

reasoning: Direct sums of the logged item_conj arrays give engine 977/977 and best-LLM llm-rag-R3 332/977, hence 1-332/977=0.6601842374616171. Applying the pinned CPU/GPU accounting gives cost_ratio_min=22835.94771419218. The production analysis rerun over eligible seq 0..8 reproduces the committed analysis object, including primary LB95=0.6345957011258956, instrument_valid=true, separation_valid=false, and the reported Holm outcomes. The canonical frozen hash reproduces 11c3dc4e797bcaf12f199217bb3279e794882113a7feca530b36b2c3916631ad; analysis/a5_llm.py hashes to 8f7aa8807b2bdda7dedd12910bc3b17552d425ee9f94123f0027cd5fa7966bc4. The 10-line chain verifies through tail 48f42584ba44738f81752dd2c049ba3bb7778a9312f2e87b04652a9c9c8aa045, with nine eligible final successful runs and runner-6 distinct from this auditor. Corpus, prompt-pack, instrument, model-revision, decode, and canonical harness-manifest pins reproduce across the cells. Literal overall pin verification fails because the frozen kot_axiom.py pin is d2064989c208c37df5a3d15a4fae6118c82516055fd6552f45a2a92fe2b7a659 while every run records the executed engine as b622694022000367349b158aea5322e63677379521c47b29a9d62f2e86e46ccf. Separately, the frozen rules evaluate top-down to rule index 2 PASS, rendered PASS-PENDING-AUDIT, but the emitted slope license contradicts the failed scale gate and sign-only envelope. Therefore the numerical verdict rule matches, yet the verdict object cannot be confirmed.
